title: Drugs beginning with C: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text: ax Â® (as a combination product containing Haemophilus influenzae type b, Hepatitis B Vaccine) see Hepatitis B Vaccine Comvax Â® (as a combination product containing Haemophilus influenzae type b, Hepatitis B) see Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) Vaccine Concentraid Â® see Desmopressin Nasal Concerta Â® see Methylphenidate Concizumab-mtci Injection Condylox Â® see Podofilox Topical Conex Â® (as a combination product containing Dexbrompheniramine, Pseudoephedrine) see Brompheniramine Conexxence Â® (denosumab-bnht) see Denosumab Injection Congestaclear Â® see Pseudoephedrine conjugated estrogens see Estrogen Injection conjugated estrogens see Estrogen Vaginal conjugated estrogens see Estrogen ConRX Â® AR (containing Aluminum Hydroxide, Magnesium Hydroxide) see Magnesium Hydroxide Consensi Â® (as a combination product containing Amlodipine, Celecoxib) see Amlodipine Consensi Â® (as a combination product containing Amlodipine, Celecoxib) see Celecoxib Constilac Â® Syrup see Lactulose Constulose Â® see Lactulose Contac Cold and Flu Â® (as a combination product containing Acetaminophen, Phenylephrine) see Phenylephrine Contepo Â® see Fosfomycin Injection contraceptive ring see Estrogen and Progestin (Vaginal Ring Contraceptives) Contrave Â® see Naltrexone and Bupropion Contrave Â® (as a combination product containing bupropion, naltrexone) see Bupropion Control Rx Â® see Fluoride
